arts.ttl: Ruben Selles reflects on Hull City's progress since last Coventry City showdown
arts.sum: City's position at the bottom end of the is perilous, while Coventry boosted their play-off hopes with a last-gasp win over Portsmouth in midweek, and come full-time on Monday night, there will be just four chances left to claim points, two of which come over the Easter weekend kicking off on Friday. Since then, they've gone on to register eight wins, collecting 28 points along the way, and given their difficult predicament, they'll be hoping that total is 31 come 10pm on Monday night.

arts.ttl: Hull City confirm major six-figure MKM Stadium development decision
arts.sum: Hull City will install safe standing inside the MKM Stadium in preparation for next season, joining the raft of clubs who have installed the modern system in recent months. The club will convert almost 2,700 seats inside the lower bowl to safe standing, using a well-renowned company who have worked with both Celtic and Norwich City in recent times, shelling out a substantial six-figure sum to complete the work.

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard explains why Jamie Paterson has been such a 'great signing' even before his goal
arts.sum: There was plenty of excitement around the club when Jamie Paterson was signed on a free transfer in February – the script written for a fairytale ending to the player’s career at hometown team Coventry City. But even before the former Bristol City and Swansea star volleyed home in spectacular style deep in stoppage time to raise the roof off the CBS Arena, Frank Lampard had already decided that Paterson has been a “great signing” for the club despite in total only making five cameo appearances from the bench, amounting to just 42 minutes of football.

arts.ttl: Lincoln details Jose Mourinho conversation as he mulls over Hull City future
arts.sum: After Jose Mourinho could not promise regular football with Fenerbahce, Lincoln said he had other offers, but the chance to come and play in England with City was the best decision he could have made for both his career and family. January signing Lincoln admits he would love to stay at Hull City beyond the end of the season, and says he wishes there were more than five games of the season left.

arts.ttl: Hull City head coach offers Louie Barry fitness update as Aston Villa man steps up recovery
arts.sum: The young playmaker won't be involved against Coventry City on Monday night when the Tigers will look to return to winning ways, nor is he expected back in full training at Cottingham before the Tigers head to Swansea City on Good Friday, or when Preston North End visit the MKM Stadium on Easter Monday, but he could be in line to feature against Derby County and then Portsmouth in the final two outings of the season. Having Barry back would be a big boost to City's attacking options and provide Selles with some much-needed creativity, something that has been lacking, though by the time he does come back, they'll hope to be well on the road to safety .
